name: The Halloween Incident
short_description: A detective story with elements of analog horror, in which you will have to conduct your own investigation to get to the truth.
detailed_description:
Storyline

The game consists of several pieces of one large puzzle.
Your task is to study the information carefully and make the choice you think is right.
The main character in the game will be a serial maniac that you have to catch.
Throughout the game you will be accompanied by strange and frightening content that will help you to get to the truth.

Gameplay

Computer Simulator: You have to study a large body of information to catch a maniac.

Point and Click: You will have to logically solve puzzles.

Story choices: Make choices and get one of 3 endings.

The time has come:

The game is not what it seems. Easter eggs are waiting for you at every step, be careful!
